features.label: Notepad
features.desc: Full-featured code editor with syntax highlighting (JS/TS/Python/HTML/CSS/JSON/SQL/Markdown/Bash), multiple tabs with rename/reorder, find & replace with regex, markdown preview + split view, diff view, snippets manager, case converter (6 types), sort lines (5 modes), trim whitespace, open/save files, auto-save to localStorage, font size control, 4 themes (Dark/Light/Monokai/Dracula), word wrap toggle, line numbers, word/char/line count. Modular structure: core/ + ui/ directories.
